spec.name: Inside The Cabin
spec.description: You are inside a small one-room cabin made entirely from heavy logs. It is very sparsely furnished, containing only the most basic housekeeping equipment, such as a bed, a chair and a table.

extra_descs.description: It is definitely not the most comfortable bed you have seen in your life.
It is made from oak and looks strong and sturdy.
A heavy table that doesn't even appear to rock. It seems to have something carved on it.
On the table is carved : /) /) Danny and Mari, Oct 31, 1991 ( o o ) = x = m m ***(========-
